pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on JDK 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag for JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiled bytecode is compatible with JDK 21 and enforces API usage restrictions appropriate for the target version.

src/main/java/com/rsc/aicode/common/Dele.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization best practices enforced by modern linters or static analysis tools.
